chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2251 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 11-09-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G-Sindh. **** Learned AAG places on record photographs of Drainage Scheme Thikrato Taluka Pano Akil, taken on record. After going through the same, counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
